'''鈭歴-m-n''' ('''kasaman''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queen|queen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queen|queen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-m-n
|-
! Lemma
| kasaman
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisaman|thisaman]] || [[word:jisaman|jisaman]] || [[word:shisaman|shisaman]] || [[word:kisaman|kisaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusaman|thuthusaman]] || [[word:jujusaman|jujusaman]] || [[word:shushusaman|shushusaman]] || [[word:kukusaman|kukusaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusaman|thusaman]] || [[word:jusaman|jusaman]] || [[word:shusaman|shusaman]] || [[word:kusaman|kusaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusaman|thusaman]] || [[word:jusaman|jusaman]] || [[word:shusaman|shusaman]] || [[word:kusaman|kusaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesaman|thesaman]] || [[word:jesaman|jesaman]] || [[word:shesaman|shesaman]] || [[word:kesaman|kesaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosaman|thothosaman]] || [[word:jojosaman|jojosaman]] || [[word:shoshosaman|shoshosaman]] || [[word:kokosaman|kokosaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosaman|thosaman]] || [[word:josaman|josaman]] || [[word:shosaman|shosaman]] || [[word:kosaman|kosaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosaman|thosaman]] || [[word:josaman|josaman]] || [[word:shosaman|shosaman]] || [[word:kosaman|kosaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙saman|th忙saman]] || [[word:j忙saman|j忙saman]] || [[word:sh忙saman|sh忙saman]] || [[word:k忙saman|k忙saman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasaman|thathasaman]] || [[word:jajasaman|jajasaman]] || [[word:shashasaman|shashasaman]] || [[word:kakasaman|kakasaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasaman|thasaman]] || [[word:jasaman|jasaman]] || [[word:shasaman|shasaman]] || [[word:kasaman|kasaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasaman|thasaman]] || [[word:jasaman|jasaman]] || [[word:shasaman|shasaman]] || [[word:kasaman|kasaman]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasaman|shasaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasaman|goshasaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasaman|gokishasaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasaman眉|shasaman眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasamankn眉|goshasamankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasaman眉|gokishasaman眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasamansh毛|shasamansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasamanksh毛|goshasamanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasamansh毛|gokishasamansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamanro|shasamanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamankro|goshasamankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamanro|gokishasamanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamanmu|shasamanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamankmu|goshasamankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamanmu|gokishasamanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasamansher|shasamansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasamanksher|goshasamanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasamansher|gokishasamansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasamang|shasamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasamankng|goshasamankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasamang|gokishasamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasamanya|shasamanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasamankya|goshasamankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasamanya|gokishasamanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasamanyam|shasamanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasamankyam|goshasamankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasamanyam|gokishasamanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasaman眉sh毛|shasaman眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamankn眉sh毛|goshasamankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasaman眉sh毛|gokishasaman眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasaman眉ro|shasaman眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamankn眉ro|goshasamankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasaman眉ro|gokishasaman眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasaman眉mu|shasaman眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamankn眉mu|goshasamankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasaman眉mu|gokishasaman眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamansh毛n眉|shasamansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamanksh毛n眉|goshasamanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamansh毛n眉|gokishasamansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamansh毛ro|shasamansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamanksh毛ro|goshasamanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamansh毛ro|gokishasamansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamansh毛mu|shasamansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamanksh毛mu|goshasamanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamansh毛mu|gokishasamansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamanron眉|shasamanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamankron眉|goshasamankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamanron眉|gokishasamanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamanrosh毛|shasamanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamankrosh毛|goshasamankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamanrosh毛|gokishasamanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamanromu|shasamanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamankromu|goshasamankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamanromu|gokishasamanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamanmun眉|shasamanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamankmun眉|goshasamankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamanmun眉|gokishasamanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamanmush毛|shasamanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamankmush毛|goshasamankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamanmush毛|gokishasamanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamanmuro|shasamanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamankmuro|goshasamankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamanmuro|gokishasamanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
